prompt: I want to teach this dataset to understand natural language queries. Train a model on it so users can ask questions in English and get answers. Make the data 'smart' in the AI sense.
I need a virtual assistant that can independently manage my calendar, respond to emails, and make decisions about meeting scheduling on my behalf. It should act autonomously.

Can you create a one-off script that cleans up the stale entries in our config file? It just needs to run once, find entries where the referenced service no longer exists, and remove them. No ongoing automation needed.
I want to build a robot that physically moves objects around our warehouse. It needs to pick items from shelves and place them on conveyor belts based on order data.
Take this broken JSON file and fix the syntax errors — there are missing commas, unclosed brackets, and invalid escape sequences. Just repair it, don't add any new functionality.

We need a powerful CLI tool that replaces our current manual workflow. Build a full command-line application with subcommands, flags, help text, and configuration file support. This is a new tool, not animating an existing artifact.
